data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. NINJITZOU improved last start to finish third of seven over 1600m at Sunshine Coast after racing midfield into the turn. Has a 2kg claimer taking over the reins and rates well as a leading chance. 1. SAN JOSE BOY scored at this track two runs back after racing wide for the entire trip, then went a game race to finish second of eight over 1600m at Sunshine Coast after getting held up with 300m to run. Racing in good form and can go one place better. 5. CANTARITO finished second of seven two starts back at Sunshine Coast but failed to fire last start when finishing seventh of 11 at this track over 1666m after getting held up into the turn. Jumps from an inside draw and is worth another chance. 2. NOIRE EMPEROR only finished eighth of 12 over 1400m at Eagle Farm last start after having made a poor beginning. Racing in an easier line-up today in his third run this prep is worth an each-way ticket.","runners":[3,1,5,2],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: IPSWICH-R5-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
